key.name: color-scheme
key.description: Color scheme: light, dark, or system

key.name: editor-font-size
key.description: Editor zoom level (1-15)

key.name: show-minimap
key.description: Whether to show the minimap in text editors

key.name: show-line-numbers
key.description: Whether to show line numbers in text editors

key.name: highlight-current-line
key.description: Whether to highlight the current line in text editors

key.name: auto-indent
key.description: Whether to enable auto indentation

key.name: panel-start-width
key.description: Width of the start panel (file tree)

key.name: panel-end-width
key.description: Width of the end panel

key.name: panel-bottom-height
key.description: Height of the bottom panel (terminal)

key.name: panel-bottom-width
key.description: Width of the bottom panel split between terminal and log

key.name: reveal-start-panel
key.description: Whether the start panel is visible

key.name: reveal-end-panel
key.description: Whether the end panel is visible

key.name: reveal-bottom-panel
key.description: Whether the bottom panel is visible

key.name: recent-projects
key.description: List of recently opened project paths

key.name: max-recent-projects
key.description: Maximum number of recent projects to remember

key.name: last-open-directory
key.description: Last directory used for opening files or projects

key.name: current-project-path
key.description: Path to the currently open project

key.name: open-documents
key.description: List of currently open document URIs

key.name: panel-layout
key.description: JSON string describing panel dock layout

key.name: grid-layout
key.description: JSON string describing grid layout

key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the main window

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the main window

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the window is maximized
